description: Table in Arabic script and eastern Arabic numerals. Possibly accounts, but could also be calendrical reckoning or something else. The entries are arranged in four columns. The letters are written individually (and rarely form words), possibly serving as abbreviations or codes. (Information in part from FGP.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
